ping.text: Faint distress ping detected from a tiny escape pod. It might be a genuine emergency, or another scam selling extended warranties. Investigate, or ignore?

investigate.text: Good instincts, Captain. The pod contained {pick:a grateful hamster-like diplomat|a lost delivery drone|a very confused tourist}. Gratitude logged. Karma balance improved by {n:3-9} points.

ignore.text: Understood. For the record, it was the extended warranty people. Your caution has been vindicated and will be studied.

drift.text: The pod has drifted out of range. Somewhere out there, someone's warranty remains tragically unextended.
